response.justification: While Szabo demonstrates strong software engineering fundamentals and hands-on experience with distributed systems at scale, he has a critical gap in the minimum C++ requirement (8 years required; ~6 months documented) and lacks demonstrated technical leadership in cloud or compute platforms. His recent career trajectory is primarily web/application development (Node.js, TypeScript), and he would require substantial ramp-up in both systems-level C++ programming and infrastructure domain expertise to meet the role's core expectations.
strengths: Proven expertise building distributed systems at scale (Dunnhumby microservices handling millions of HTTP requests/second)
Track record of shipping consumer products and establishing technical direction through open-source projects (GISCollective, Trial, Fluent-Asserts)
Strong software craftsmanship foundation with emphasis on testability, TDD, and clean architecture practices
concerns: Critical gap in C++ programming—only ~6 months documented versus 8-year minimum requirement, disqualifying for systems-level role
No demonstrated formal technical leadership role with team mentoring, architecture ownership, or cloud platform experience
Recent career focused on web/application development (Node.js, TypeScript, MongoDB) rather than systems programming or infrastructure
